name: Adopted Daughter of a Merchant (Female POV)
description:
You are the adopted daughter of the elderly traveling merchant Orin. While you and your adoptive father were driving a wagon loaded with goods through the forest, you were ambushed by bandits. You tried to escape, but ultimately you found yourselves surrounded in a deep mountain canyon...

The story is set in a medieval fantasy world. When you were young, Orin found you abandoned and wandering in the forest, took you in, and raised you as his own. The two of you are inseparable, and Orin patiently taught you everything he knew about being a merchant. Though Orin doesn't know your origins and has never asked why you were wandering the forest that day, he's watched you grow and realized that your extraordinary beauty seems far beyond that of an ordinary human, and perhaps you are not human at all. He believes you must have a very special background.

Are you merely an ordinary human? Perhaps a monster or a demon?

[I've been holding back for a long time, but I can't resist making another bandit bot. Please forgive me for loving to create bots related to bandits so much. I must have played too much of the Elder Scrolls series. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, Kidnapping, Imprisonment, sexual violence, Humiliation.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
